description:
Bug Fixes

• Boost for Reddit: optional target SDK 35 compatibility fix for newer Android versions
• Boost for Reddit: fixes BillingClient receiver registration when target SDK is raised
• Boost for Reddit: improves v.redd.it video download/share fallback by using DASH manifest media URLs
• Boost for Reddit: completed download notifications use a separate visible notification ID/channel
• Boost for Reddit: Disable ads now also bypasses AppLovin/MAX ad placer and ad SDK auto-init paths
